message:
fix(web): add request ID guard to early return in loadPhage

Added defensive guard to the early return when phage is null,
ensuring setLoadingPhage(false) only runs for the current request.
This prevents a race condition where an older request returning null
could clear loading state for a newer in-flight request.

Note: The guard is technically redundant (we already checked requestId
at line 438), but included for consistency with the pattern used
throughout loadPhage and defensive programming.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
